pi_items.source: Verified via docker-compose.yml: BAHMNI_BASE_URL=https://localhost, OPENMRS_BASE_URL=${BAHMNI_BASE_URL}/openmrs. Script setup_task.sh confirms URL structure via OpenMRS REST API endpoint at ${OPENMRS_API_URL}/form. OpenMRS standard admin interface located at /openmrs/admin.

Web search confirmed: Bahmni default admin username is 'superman'. Verified in setup_bahmni.sh (OPENMRS_ADMIN_USERNAME='superman'), task_utils.sh (BAHMNI_ADMIN_USERNAME='superman'), and multiple Bahmni documentation sources.

Web search confirmed: Bahmni default admin password is 'Admin123'. Verified in setup_bahmni.sh (OPENMRS_ADMIN_PASSWORD='Admin123'), task_utils.sh (BAHMNI_ADMIN_PASSWORD='Admin123'), and multiple Bahmni documentation sources (https://bahmni.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/BAH/pages/3135995905/Changing+Default+Credentials+of+Bahmni+Docker).

This is a task requirement (what the agent must create), not a system property. However, verified that Bahmni/OpenMRS supports form creation with custom names through the administration interface. The form name format and content are consistent with OpenMRS form naming conventions.
This is a task requirement. Verified that OpenMRS form API supports version field. The version format '1.0' is consistent with OpenMRS form versioning conventions.

This is a task requirement specifying what keywords the form description must contain. Verified that Bahmni forms support descriptions and these keywords are semantically appropriate for a COVID-19 screening form based on general medical terminology and public health documentation.

docker-compose.yml specifies: bahmni/openmrs:1.0.1, bahmni/proxy:1.0.0, bahmni/bahmni-web:1.0.0. Bahmni is a verified open-source EMR system (https://www.bahmni.org). OpenMRS is a verified open-source medical records system.

pi_items.metadata_value: Docker containerized Bahmni stack with self-signed HTTPS
pi_items.verified_value: Docker containerized Bahmni stack with self-signed HTTPS
pi_items.source: Verified via docker-compose.yml (services: proxy, openmrs, openmrsdb, bahmni-web, etc.). Setup scripts confirm HTTPS with self-signed certificates (task_utils.sh: curl -sk to skip cert verification, setup_bahmni.sh: 'Bahmni proxy uses HTTPS (self-signed cert)').

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a clinical form in Bahmni 1.0.0/OpenMRS 1.0.1 via the administration interface at https://localhost/openmrs/admin using verified default credentials (username: superman, password: Admin123). The form must be named 'COVID-19 Screening Form', version '1.0', with a published status and description containing the keywords 'covid', 'symptom', and 'exposure'. Bahmni is an established open-source EMR system supporting form creation with custom names, versions, descriptions, and publication status. The environment uses Docker containers with HTTPS protected by self-signed certificates.
